threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You still look confused when the bus arrives at a random stop and everyone dashes off like it’s a race. Welcome to Hackney!
Saw a guy on the 35 last night arguing with a bin about whether it was a good friend. Bin didn’t respond. London transport at its best.

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: I knew I was home when the kebab shop owner started asking about my family, remembering my usual order without me saying a word.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: You can grab a currywurst from a stand while a techno DJ spins right next to you. Only in Berlin do late-night snacks come with a side of beats.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: Only a true local knows you can’t count on Muni to get you anywhere on time, but you'll still miss the 49 if you run to catch it.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught the 21 bus this morning, and it stopped to let a guy off just outside a taco truck—he got out with a full plate before anyone could blink.

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists always skip the little artisan bakeries; they think all bread is from the big chains. Miss the real local flavor that's just around the corner.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: You can spot them easily; they still ask for ketchup with their patates braves at Carrer de Torrent de l'Olla.

threadTitle: Things that instantly reveal you just moved here
body: You still call it a 'high street' instead of 'the Kingsland'—and you're only in Tesco for the meal deals.
Heard a guy on the 196 rapping about lost love and you could feel the heartbreak echo through the bus. Just a regular night ride turned into something surreal.

threadTitle: When you knew you were actually living here
body: When I spotted a bride posing for photos in front of a kebab shop, while the shop owner was serving customers like it was the most normal thing in the world.

threadTitle: Things Berlin does that nowhere else does
body: You can find a bar here where they serve cocktails in Lego cups. It's bizarre, and perfect for the eclectic vibe of Kreuzberg.

threadTitle: Real signs someone is from here vs just working here
body: A real local knows to stash their burrito in a jacket pocket while waiting for the 22, no one wants that cold salsa splash on their lap.

threadTitle: Muni moments that define this city
body: Caught the 14 Mission with a full mariachi band aboard yesterday. Only in SF do you get spontaneous concerts at rush hour.

threadTitle: Things tourists get wrong about living here
body: Tourists think Gràcia's all about the lively squares, but they miss the quiet corners where locals sip café amb llet, just listening to the world go by.

threadTitle: How to spot a recent arrival
body: You can tell by their confusion at the bus network; locals know the secret shortcuts but they’re still stuck using Google Maps.
